prompt:
A freshly 3D-printed PLA trophy core sitting on a cutting mat, matte and slightly textured with visible layer lines, ready for sanding. Nearby are fine-grit sandpaper sheets, a small deburring tool, and a clean press-fit slot or recess where a nameplate will seat, making it unambiguous this is the unfinished “core” of a collectible award.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk maker workshop: soft cinematic lighting, clean bench organization, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the trophy core centered and well-lit so it reads clearly as an inventory icon.
